name: Porta Cabin Office
description:
Porta Cabin Office — Site Manager Workspace, Ready in Days

A porta cabin office from SAMAN is the most commonly deployed site workspace in Indian construction — factory-built with electrical fitout, AC provision, and ventilation configured before dispatch, so your project team can start working from day one of installation.

Modern glass-front porta cabin office designed for site workspace

How Many People in Your Site Team — Cabin Size by Team Count

The first decision before ordering a porta cabin site office is the right size for your team. This table gives you the answer before you call.

Site Team Size Recommended Cabin Size Configuration
1–2 (supervisor or site in-charge) 10×10 ft Single room, 2 workstations
3–4 (small project team) 10×15 ft Single room, 4 workstations
4–6 (project office) 10×20 ft Single room or add partition
6–8 (multi-team or drawing office) 12×20 ft Open plan or partitioned
8–12 (engineering team) 20×20 ft Multi-partition or two conjoined cabins
12+ (full project management compound) Two cabins or custom Compound configuration — confirm at quote stage

If your team size falls between two rows, size up — a cabin that is slightly large is a functional workspace. A cabin that is too small is a problem every day of the project.

Standard Site Office Fitout — What Is Included and What Is Not

A standard SAMAN porta cabin site office is factory-configured with the following before dispatch from our Bangalore or Greater Noida facility:

Included as standard: 6-point single-phase electrical distribution board with 15A main connection provision. One AC mounting bracket with pre-wired conduit and drain outlet through the wall. Three aluminium sliding windows with mosquito mesh for cross-ventilation. One lockable steel entry door with two keys. One LED tube light fitting on the ceiling. One ventilation louvre on the rear or side wall.

Not included as standard: Furniture — workstation desks, office chairs, storage cabinets. AC unit — the provision is factory-fitted, the unit is supplied and installed by your team. LAN or internet cable provision. Internal partition wall — available as an add-on confirmed at the quote stage.

Modular porta cabin layout suitable for large engineering teams

For project site offices where the senior management requires a fully premium interior — false ceiling, vinyl flooring, and factory-fitted AC — our luxury porta cabin page covers the upgrade specification and cost.

Single-Room, Partitioned, or Compound — Choosing Your Layout

Three layout options are available for a SAMAN porta cabin site office. Choose based on your team structure and whether private working space is needed.

Single-room: All team members in one open space. Most economical and fastest to fabricate. Right for teams of 1 to 4 where all members work on the same tasks and no separate meeting space is required.

Partitioned two-room: A steel stud internal partition with a flush door divides the cabin into a main office and a smaller meeting or document room. Adds Rs 8,000 to Rs 12,000 to the standard cabin cost. Right for 4 to 8 person teams where the site manager needs a separate enclosed space for reviews, contractor meetings, or document storage.

Two-cabin compound: Two 10×20 ft cabins placed side-by-side or connected by a covered steel walkway. Each cabin functions independently with its own entry and electrical connection. Right for 10 or more person project teams or where the project management team and the engineering or drawing team need separate working areas.

From Order Confirmation to First Working Day

A standard SAMAN porta cabin site office is ready for first-day occupancy in 10 to 14 working days from order confirmation — fabrication, delivery, and installation included. For the full breakdown of fabrication stages and payment timeline, see our buy porta cabins page.

Standard porta cabin fitout with electrical and ventilation setup

What happens on-site is what determines your actual first working day. SAMAN's installation crew places and levels the cabin on your confirmed base surface — concrete plinth, compacted ground, or steel grillage. Levelling and securing takes 4 to 6 hours. The factory-fitted electrical distribution board is pre-wired to the incoming supply point. Your site electrician connects the main supply and energises the board — same day or the following morning. AC connection, if required, is made to the factory-provided bracket and pre-wired conduit.

Your project team can work from the cabin on the day the electrical connection is live — no further site work required.

Porta Cabin Site Office vs Purpose-Built Portable Office — When Each Is Right

A porta cabin configured as a site office costs Rs 1,05,000 to Rs 1,80,000 for a 10×15 to 10×20 ft configuration and is the right choice for construction site deployments of 1 to 3 years — the standard project duration for most Indian infrastructure and construction projects.

A purpose-built portable office cabin is designed with a higher interior finish standard, larger window-to-wall ratio, and purpose-engineered workspace ergonomics — it costs 20 to 30% more. It is the right choice when the workspace will be used beyond a project context, when the occupants are client-facing, or when the deployment is semi-permanent.

Premium portable office cabin with enhanced aesthetics and comfort

If you are a construction or infrastructure project team setting up a temporary site office — a porta cabin is adequate and more economical. If your requirement is a permanent or semi-permanent workplace office — see our portable office cabin page for that specification.

For the full SAMAN porta cabin range — all sizes, materials, delivery options, and rental availability — see our porta cabins hub page.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can the internal partition wall be removed later if the team grows and we need one open room?

Yes. The steel stud partition in a SAMAN porta cabin site office is a bolted structure — it can be removed by a site fabricator in 2 to 3 hours without affecting the main structural frame or any wall panels. If there is a possibility your team will grow and the partition may need to come out, confirm this at the quote stage and we will design the partition with pre-drilled removal points.

Does a SAMAN porta cabin site office comply with IS 7969 safety requirements for construction site facilities?

Yes. IS 7969 specifies minimum safety requirements for construction site offices — roof dead load, floor load, weather protection, and structural stability thresholds. A SAMAN porta cabin site office meets all IS 7969 structural thresholds. If your project procurement document or client specification requires IS 7969 compliance confirmation, request a compliance declaration at the quote stage — we issue this at no additional cost.

What is the maximum number of electrical points in a standard 10×20 ft site office?

A standard 10×20 ft SAMAN porta cabin site office has a 6-point distribution board with provision for up to 8 outlets — 6 standard 5A power sockets and 2 heavy-load 15A outlets (one dedicated AC circuit, one for a printer or drawing plotter). If your project team needs more than 8 outlets, a second distribution board is available as a quote-stage add-on at an additional Rs 3,500 to Rs 4,500.

Tell us your site team size, required layout, and site location.

We will confirm the right cabin size, standard fitout, and delivery timeline within 24 hours.

Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937
short_description:
🏗️ Construction site office · Team-sized · AC-ready · IS 7969 compliant · 10–14 days to first working day

Porta cabin office for construction and infrastructure sites. 6-point board, AC provision, 3 windows — factory-fitted. Team-sized from 2 to 12+ people. Partition and compound layouts available.

Size
24′ × 12′ × 8.6″
Fitout
6-pt Board · AC Bracket · LED
Delivery
7–21 Working Days
Layout
Single · Partitioned · Compound
Brand

Best For
Site Teams · EPC · Project Offices

From Rs 1,05,000 · Partition add-on Rs 8–12K · IS 7969 compliant
